explanation.text: **The Logic:** AS 30 was withdrawn when India adopted the Ind AS framework. Ind AS 109 (Financial Instruments) now governs derivative accounting for companies following Ind AS. **The Trap:** AS 30 is no longer applicable — Ind AS 109 has replaced it. **Cross-Exam Context:** Accounting standard transitions are tested in Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Companies using the older AS framework and those using Ind AS have different accounting treatments for derivatives.
